title: Continue ccbot desloppify cleanup beyond current small batch
description: Follow-up from 2026-05-02 cleanup pass. Current desloppify status after commits: strict 79.0/100, 251 open, focus Cross-module arch 68.0, queue/planned review work remains. Top remaining items include MessageTask variant bag, SessionManager state hub, callback window authorization binding checks, delivery package placement, and audit API width. Keep future batches small, behavior-locked with tests, and avoid mixing production behavior fixes with broad cleanup.
acceptance_criteria: Run desloppify next/show review, choose one bounded item, add/keep regression coverage, run targeted tests plus ruff, rescan, and record resolved issues with desloppify plan commit-log.
